name: Shop-Shop-Redux
text: Shop-Shop-Redux is an e-commerce MERN application that utilizes Apollo, Redux, GraphQL and Stripe to facilitate a smooth, user-friendly online shopping experience.

name: Budget-Tracker
text: Budget Tracker API is an Express-based, progressive web application (PWA) designed to allow users to track their budget, whether internet service is available or not.

name: Parents Only
text: Parents-Only is a MERN application designed to give parents the opportunity to meet other parents with similar lifestyle to connect and make friends. This app was a collaborative effort and uses Node, Express, MongoDB, Apollo and React.

name: SubMyFood
text: SubMyFood is a web application that showcases the use of third party API's, HTML, CSS, Bulma and Javascript. Utilizing the Recipe Puppy API and the Meal-Hero API, this app allows users to look up recipes and offers comparable substitutions for each ingredient.

name: Employee-Manager
text: A command-line application to manage a company's employee database, using Node.js, Inquirer, and MySQL.

name: Notable
text: A note taking application that uses an Express.js-driven back end that captures user input to write, store, and delete notes.
